description: This is a Legacy item and should not be used.

fields.ExpandLerp: How much to expand the mesh outwards
fields.InnerCircle: Whether this mesh has an inner circle.
fields.RadiusStart: The distance from the inner side of the segments to the center.
fields.Thickness: How thick the segments are from the circle center.
fields.MainSegmentArc: The main segment arc from the dead platform.
fields.SeparationAngle: How far apart the segments should be.
fields.MenuMainSegmentArc: How big the main segment should be.
fields.MenuRadiusStart: Where the menu starts on a circle in degrees.
fields.MenuThickness: How thick the menu items are from circle center.
fields.FillColor: what color to fill the segments with.
fields.OutlineColor: What color the outline of the segments should be.
fields.CircleItemOverrides: Custom list of segments to use.
fields.IndependentSegments: Custom list of independent segments to use.
fields.OutlineWidth: The width of the item outlines.
